name: Multi-Agent Orchestrator
description: 在 OpenClaw 上派发、追踪、校验、review 多 agent 协作任务。基于 branch-per-agent + worktree 隔离 + git 强校验 + Claude Code 智能 review。

concurrencyLimit.label: Concurrency Limit
concurrencyLimit.help: 同时跑的 agent 数（默认 3，BLOCKED 不占名额）

planGateKeywords.label: Plan-mode Trigger Keywords
planGateKeywords.help: 命中即拒绝直接派 impl，强制先派 plan-doc

baseBranch.description: Long-term branch that mao tasks branch from and merge into. Use a dedicated branch like 'mao-main' to isolate mao activity from the project's primary main branch.

workspaceRoot.description: Git repo root that holds the workspace where worktrees are created. Tilde is expanded at runtime.

verifyMode.description: skip = bypass VERIFYING (e2e/dev only); git = real three-check

agentBinaries.description: Override the binaries mao spawns. Defaults to `kimi` and `opencode` resolved via PATH (PATH augmented with /home/admin/.local/bin and /home/admin/.npm-global/bin at spawn time).

kimi.description: Path or name of Kimi Code CLI binary

opencode.description: Path or name of OpenCode CLI binary

diskAlertGiB.description: Total worktrees/ size in GiB to trigger Discord disk alert (0 disables)

worktreeRetentionHours.description: How long to keep a terminal task's worktree+branch around for tui resume after the task finishes. Monitor auto-prunes after this. 0 = no retention (cleanup immediately).

discordChannel.description: OpenClaw channel id（在 channels 子系统配置）
